title: Origins: Subterranea
description: A low-impact origins addon intended for those players who want to live underground and only underground, with some... ...interesting vision modifications
body:
Subterranea is an origins addon I made for a server event in 2025. Though it ended up going unused, perhaps someone else will enjoy the cave-dwelling playstyle these origins encourage.

## Origins:

### Batkin
Batkin are agile climbers who rely on echolocation to 'see'

### Molekin
Molekin are quick miners who see well in dark caves but not in the sun's light

### Axolotlkin
Axolotlkin are aquatic cave dwellers that require humidity to survive.

## Other stuff:

Subterranea is unlikely to be consistently updated. It may recieve 1-3 more origins at random points when I get a burst of motivation to do something with it. Don't hold out too much hope.

this may be brought to a more recent version once 1.20.1 stops being the best one for mods
